title: Council of Ministers to aid and advise Governor
description: Provides that the Governor acts on the aid and advice of the Council of Ministers, except where constitutional discretion is explicitly allowed.

title: Constitution of Legislatures in States
description: Defines the constitutional structure of state legislatures and positions the Governor within that structure.

title: Duration of State Legislatures
description: Sets the normal five-year term of a Legislative Assembly unless dissolved sooner in accordance with the Constitution.

title: Assent to Bills
description: Empowers the Governor to assent, withhold assent, return certain bills for reconsideration, or reserve bills for the President.

title: Failure of Constitutional Machinery in States
description: Allows President's Rule where governance cannot be carried on according to the Constitution, based in part on a Governor's report.
